Impassion is a youth-founded art program in San Diego. We run hands-on workshops and classes for all ages, all skill levels, and all backgrounds.

About

Art belongs to everyone.

Impassion is a youth-founded art program based in Scripps Ranch, San Diego. We started it because we believe access to quality art education should not depend on where you live or how much money you have. We run free library sessions and affordable small-group classes, and we are just getting started.

Youth-Founded Scripps Ranch, SD All Ages All Skill Levels Supplies Provided
